windows.title: Alpha Suite V2 — AI Trade Terminal

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https://integrate.api.nvidia.com https://api.kite.trade; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:

bundle.longDescription: Alpha Suite V2 — A real-time AI trading terminal powered by DeepSeek v4 Pro, Zerodha Kite integration, and Kafka-driven market data pipelines. Features institutional-grade charting with EMA ribbons, volume histograms, predictive ghost lines, and modular workspace management.
